text.title: Chunking Production Service — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure: validate config → dispatch → chunk → tag metadata → catch exceptions → log + fallback.

section.title: Step 1 — Validate ChunkingConfig at __init__
section.p: Verify strategy ∈ enum. If strategy == SEMANTIC, verify embedding_func is callable. If overlap >= chunk_size, raise. Apply r1-fail-fast-config.

section.title: Step 2 — Dispatch by strategy
section.p: Lookup table maps strategy enum value to the sub-chunker instance. Apply r2-strategy-enum-dispatch — reject free strings.

section.title: Step 3 — Chunk inside try block
section.p: Call sub-chunker `chunk(text, source)`. On success, continue to metadata propagation. On exception, jump to step 5.

section.title: Step 4 — Propagate metadata onto every chunk
section.p: Merge caller metadata into each chunk's `metadata` field with caller-takes-precedence on conflict. Apply r3-metadata-propagation. Stamp `strategy_used` on each chunk per r5.

section.title: Step 5 — Exception handler: log + fallback
section.p: Log {source, requested_strategy, exception, traceback} at WARNING. Run word-split fallback. Stamp strategy_used="fallback" on resulting chunks. Append a `warnings[]` entry per r4-logged-fallback.

section.title: Step 6 — Emit service envelope
section.p: Return {requested_strategy, strategy_used, chunk_count, chunks, warnings} per content/02-output-contract.xml.
